subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Inscribe in the Most Glorious Script mention of him who hath turned toward the Lord of all beings, that the Call may so attract him that naught shall prevent him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم الاعلی اذکر بخط الابهی من اقبل الی مولی الوری لیجذبه الندآء بحیث لاتمنعه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
